---
ID: US-OLV-113
Title: Use responsive module shells
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-18
Milestone: Normalize design tokens and responsive behavior

As a mobile operator
I want module pages that fit desktop, tablet, and phone widths
So that I can use the app on smaller devices

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Sidebars collapse behind hamburger controls on mobile.
- [ ] Filterbar and topbar controls fit 375px-500px widths.
- [ ] Tables and account cards avoid horizontal layout breakage where audited.
- [ ] Touch targets meet the intended minimum size.

Notes: Backdated from Apr 18 responsive audit commits.
---
